risk_if_not_implemented: Without Identifiable Image Collection, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Restrict Collection To Identified Purpose
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to minimize the collection of Personal Data (PD) to only what is adequate, relevant and limited to the purposes identified in the data privacy notice, including protections against collecting PD from minors without appropriate parental or legal guardian consent.
compensating_control_1.justification: Restrict Collection To Identified Purpose (PRI-04) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Identifiable Image Collection (PRI-04.3) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Data & Asset Classification
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to ensure data and assets are categorized in accordance with applicable statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements.
compensating_control_2.justification: Data & Asset Classification (DCH-02) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Identifiable Image Collection (PRI-04.3) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
